falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if Argentina manufacturing-share change 1995-2019 is within +/- 2 pp of comparator-mean change (no measurable Mercosur effect). PARTIAL if Argentina performs better than comparators by more than 2 pp. REFUTED if Argentina performs worse by more than 2 pp.
